headline: Montgomery lawsuit likely headed back to Illinois district court
summary: The groundbreaking Montgomery case will head back to the federal district court where it began. The post Montgomery lawsuit likely headed back to Illinois district court appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Underweight on C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Raises Price Target to $91
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Ravi Shanker   maintains C.H. Robinson Worldwide (NASDAQ:CHRW) with a Underweight and raises the price target from $90 to $91.

headline: 3 Overrated  Stocks We Find Risky
summary: Each stock in this article is trading near its 52-week high. These elevated prices usually indicate some degree of investor confidence, business improvements, or favorable market conditions.
